title: Institute Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
description: Awarded to top-performing students from economically weaker sections. Maintains a high CGPA requirement.

title: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships
description: For university and college students with above 80th percentile in relevant stream.

title: Adobe India Women-in-Tech Scholarship
description: Recognizing outstanding female students in computer science and engineering fields.

title: ONGC Scholarship for SC/ST
description: Exclusive financial assistance for meritorious SC/ST students pursuing engineering or MBA.

title: Google PhD Fellowship Program
description: Supporting outstanding graduate students doing exceptional research in computer science.
